item.title: Terraform Vault Provider
item.description: Overview Read, write and configure Vault Best practice: avoid secrets in Terraform config and state Use Cases Configure and Populate Vault with Secrets Initial setup and configuration of Vault Populate with secrets State and plans should be stored with care—will contain the secrets written to Vault in plaintext Use Vault Credentials in Terraform Config Inject 3rd party provider credentials into config Vault manages credentials Only need suitably privileged Vault token—temporary lease of provider credentials Secrets returned from Vault data sources are stored in state, plan and displayed on command line in plaintext Need to ensure adequate protection Vault provider requests Vault token with short TTL by default (20 mins) to reduce attack window
